title: viewport.getThumbnail response result
description: A still thumbnail of the engine's external viewport. The image is a base64-encoded snapshot copy of the framebuffer, never a reference into engine live memory.

imageBase64.description: Base64-encoded image bytes. Per docs/memory-buffer-policy.md the raw image is hard-capped at 256 KiB (~342 KiB base64); an engine that cannot meet this downscales further or returns an error rather than emit an oversized frame.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the encoded image, e.g. "image/png". Allows a future JPEG switch without a protocol change.

width.description: Optional decoded width in pixels (alpha hard cap 640).

height.description: Optional decoded height in pixels (alpha hard cap 360).
